scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm run start:dev --workspace apps/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
